lines: The World Cup is in full swing here in the U.S., with matches happening every day.
The Fever fell to the Dream 113‑96 yesterday but will host the Mercury at 8 p.m. tomorrow.
The Indians beat the Cubs 3‑1 today and will face the RailRiders on Tuesday night.
Caitlin Clark averages about 21 a game for the Fever, one of the league’s top scorers.
escape_hatch: I mostly just catch the highlights, honestly.
ticker: WNBA · Indiana Fever lost to Atlanta Dream 113-96
WNBA · Indiana Fever vs Phoenix Mercury tomorrow 8:00 PM ET
TRIPLE-A · Indianapolis Indians beat Iowa Cubs 3-1

display:

* The Fever fell to the Dream 113‑96 yesterday but will host the Mercury at 8 p.m. tomorrow.  
* The Indians beat the Cubs 3‑1 today and will face the RailRiders on Tuesday night.  
* Caitlin Clark averages about 21 a game for the Fever, one of the league’s top scorers.  

Escape hatch: I mostly just catch the highlights, honestly.
speech: Here's the sports talk for Indianapolis, Sunday, June 21. The World Cup is in full swing here in the U.S., with matches happening every day. The Fever fell to the Dream 113‑96 yesterday but will host the Mercury at 8 p.m. tomorrow. The Indians beat the Cubs 3‑1 today and will face the RailRiders on Tuesday night. Caitlin Clark averages about 21 a game for the Fever, one of the league’s top scorers. And if it gets away from you, your out is: I mostly just catch the highlights, honestly.
